title: Smoky Canadian Pistachio Roast
description: A smoky, crisp roast infused with a creamy pistachio paste, recalling Canadian forest flavors, perfect for an anti-inflammatory diet.
instructions: Trim and pat dry chicken breast, then slice into 2cm thick pieces.
Whisk together olive oil, maple syrup, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, pepper, and lemon juice to create a glaze.
Coat chicken pieces evenly with glaze and let marinate for 15 minutes.
Blend pistachios with oat flour until a fine paste forms.
Heat bamboo steamer over medium heat and arrange chicken flat on parchment lined tray.
Steam chicken for 12 minutes until cooked through and juices run clear.
Remove from steamer and brush pistachio paste over the hot chicken to coat the surface.
Return to steamer for an additional 3 minutes to set the paste and create a smoky crust.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
